name: wyrdeer
flavor_text: The black orbs shine with an uncanny light when the Pokémon is erecting invisible barriers. The fur shed from its beard retains heat well and is a highly useful material for winter clothing.

moves.name: tackle
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: leer
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Defense by one stage.

moves.name: confusion
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to confuse the target.

moves.name: astonish
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: hypnosis
moves.effect: Puts the target to sleep.

moves.name: stomp
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: sand-attack
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s accuracy by one stage.

moves.name: extrasensory
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: role-play
moves.effect: Copies the target’s ability.

moves.name: megahorn
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: agility
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Speed by two stages.

moves.name: body-slam
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: bulldoze
moves.effect: Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.

moves.name: calm-mind
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Special Attack and Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: charge-beam
moves.effect: Has a 70% chance to raise the user’s Special Attack by one stage.

moves.name: confuse-ray
moves.effect: Confuses the target.

moves.name: curse
moves.effect: Ghosts pay half their max HP to hurt the target every turn.  Others decrease Speed but raise Attack and Defense.

moves.name: dig
moves.effect: User digs underground, dodging all attacks, and hits next turn.

moves.name: double-edge
moves.effect: User receives 1/3 the damage inflicted in recoil.

moves.name: earth-power
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: earthquake
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage and can hit Dig users.

moves.name: endure
moves.effect: Prevents the user’s HP from lowering below 1 this turn.

moves.name: energy-ball
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: expanding-force
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: facade
moves.effect: Power doubles if user is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned.

moves.name: future-sight
moves.effect: Hits the target two turns later.

moves.name: giga-impact
moves.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.

moves.name: gravity
moves.effect: Disables moves and immunities that involve flying or levitating for five turns.

moves.name: helping-hand
moves.effect: Ally’s next move inflicts half more damage.

moves.name: high-horsepower
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: hyper-beam
moves.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.

moves.name: imprison
moves.effect: Prevents the target from using any moves that the user also knows.

moves.name: light-screen
moves.effect: Reduces damage from special attacks by 50% for five turns.

moves.name: lunge
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Attack by one stage after inflicting damage.

moves.name: protect
moves.effect: Prevents any moves from hitting the user this turn.

moves.name: psybeam
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to confuse the target.

moves.name: psych-up
moves.effect: Discards the user’s stat changes and copies the target’s.

moves.name: psychic
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: psyshock
moves.effect: Inflicts damage based on the target’s Defense, not Special Defense.

moves.name: rain-dance
moves.effect: Changes the weather to rain for five turns.

moves.name: reflect
moves.effect: Reduces damage from physical attacks by half.

moves.name: rest
moves.effect: User sleeps for two turns, completely healing itself.

moves.name: roar
moves.effect: Immediately ends wild battles.  Forces trainers to switch Pokémon.

moves.name: scary-face
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Speed by two stages.

moves.name: shadow-ball
moves.effect: Has a 20% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: skill-swap
moves.effect: User and target swap abilities.

moves.name: sleep-talk
moves.effect: Randomly uses one of the user’s other three moves.  Only works if the user is sleeping.

moves.name: solar-beam
moves.effect: Requires a turn to charge before attacking.

moves.name: spite
moves.effect: Lowers the PP of the target’s last used move by 4.

moves.name: stored-power
moves.effect: Power is higher the more the user’s stats have been raised, to a maximum of 31×.

moves.name: substitute
moves.effect: Transfers 1/4 of the user’s max HP into a doll, protecting the user from further damage or status changes until it breaks.

moves.name: sunny-day
moves.effect: Changes the weather to sunny for five turns.

moves.name: swift
moves.effect: Never misses.

moves.name: take-down
moves.effect: User receives 1/4 the damage it inflicts in recoil.

moves.name: thief
moves.effect: Takes the target’s item.

moves.name: throat-chop
moves.effect: Prevents the target from using sound-based moves for two turns.

moves.name: thunder
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: thunder-wave
moves.effect: Paralyzes the target.

moves.name: thunderbolt
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: trick
moves.effect: User and target swap items.

moves.name: trick-room
moves.effect: For five turns, slower Pokémon will act before faster Pokémon.

moves.name: uproar
moves.effect: Forced to use this move for several turns.  Pokémon cannot fall asleep in that time.

moves.name: wild-charge
moves.effect: User receives 1/4 the damage it inflicts in recoil.

moves.name: zen-headbutt
moves.effect: Has a 20% chance to make the target flinch.

abilitiesDetailed.name: intimidate
abilitiesDetailed.effect: Lowers opponents' Attack one stage upon entering battle.

abilitiesDetailed.name: frisk
abilitiesDetailed.effect: Reveals an opponent's held item upon entering battle.

abilitiesDetailed.name: sap-sipper
abilitiesDetailed.effect: Absorbs grass moves, raising Attack one stage.
